title: Tsûgaku densha
original_title: 通学シリーズ 通学電車
overview: Yuna has a crush on Haru. She sees him on the train every morning when she goes to school. She doesn't know anything about him and he goes to a different school from her. One morning, she wakes up and finds Haru sleeping right next to her.
